title: Referred publications 2022
description: You may need to refer to some of these publications and rulings to prepare your 2022 tax return.
keywords: Publication, Publications, Rulings and determinations, TaxPack, Tax return, TaxTime, 2022, referred publications, referred publication

content_blocks.text: To help you understand your tax obligations and complete your 2022 tax return, we have provided a list of publications. Some publications are essential to complete some items.

items: Attribution managed investment trust (AMIT) tax return instructions 2022
Attribution managed investment trust member annual statement and standard distribution statement: guidance notes for trustees 2022
Family trust election, revocation or variation 2022
Franking account tax return and instructions 2022
Guide to foreign income tax offset rules 2022
Personal investors guide to capital gains tax 2022
Refund of franking credit instructions and application for individuals 2022
Refund of franking credits for individuals - application form 2022
Research and development tax incentive schedule 2022
Research and development tax incentive schedule instructions 2022
Self-managed superannuation fund annual return instructions 2022
Strata title body corporate tax return and instructions 2022

content_text:
To help you understand your tax obligations and complete your 2022 tax return, we have provided a list of publications. Some publications are essential to complete some items.
## Publications
- Attribution managed investment trust (AMIT) tax return instructions 2022
- Attribution managed investment trust member annual statement and standard distribution statement: guidance notes for trustees 2022
- Business and professional items 2022
- Capital gains tax (CGT) schedule 2022
- Company tax return 2022
- Company tax return instructions 2022
- Consolidated groups losses schedule 2022
- Consolidated groups losses schedule instructions 2022
- Deductions for prepaid expenses 2022
- Dividend and interest schedule 2022
- Family trust election, revocation or variation 2022
- Film industry incentives 2022
- Foreign income return form guide
- Franking account tax return and instructions 2022
- Fund income tax return 2022
- Fund income tax return instructions 2022
- Government super contributions workbook 2022
- Guide to capital gains tax 2022
- Guide to depreciating assets 2022
- Guide to foreign income tax offset rules 2022
- Income averaging for special professionals 2022
- Individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2022
- Individual tax return 2022 (for tax agents)
- Individual tax return instructions 2022
- Information for primary producers 2022
- International dealings schedule 2022
- International dealings schedule instructions 2022
- Interposed entity election or revocation 2022
- Life insurance companies taxation schedule 2022
- Losses schedule 2022
- Losses schedule instructions 2022
- Non-individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2022
- Non-lodgment advice 2022
- Partnership tax return 2022
- Partnership tax return instructions 2022
- Personal investors guide to capital gains tax 2022
- Refund of franking credit instructions and application for individuals 2022
- Refund of franking credits for individuals - application form 2022
- Rental properties 2022
- Research and development tax incentive schedule 2022
- Research and development tax incentive schedule instructions 2022
- Salary and wage occupation codes 2022
- Self-managed superannuation fund annual return 2022
- Self-managed superannuation fund annual return instructions 2022
- Strata title body corporate tax return and instructions 2022
- Superannuation lump sum schedule
- Tax return for individuals 2022
- Tax return for individuals (supplementary section) 2022
- Trust tax return 2022
- Trust tax return instructions 2022
- Ultimate beneficiary schedule
- You and your shares 2022
source_description: You may need to refer to some of these publications and rulings to prepare your 2022 tax return.
